name: Quiche Poland
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound ground Polish sausage, finely ground up
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large skillet, sauté the chopped yellow onion, parsley, and green onion in 2 tablespoons of butter until lightly browned.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms to the pan last and cook until they are no longer slippery.
4. Turn off the heat and stir in the ground Polish sausage.
5. Beat together the eggs, whipping cream, Lawry's seasoned salt, and grated Swiss cheese.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the sautéed vegetables and sausage in a 9-inch pie dish.
7. Brush the edges of the pie shell with beaten egg white.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until set.
9. Allow the quiche to cool for 15 minutes before serving.
10. You may substitute one cup chopped ham for the sausage.
